html:
Exclusive to:  
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

A Nitre Formation is an object in Don't Starve Together that forms in Blue Ponds (characterized by their color, Algae and Eels) in the Caves as a result of Acid Rain. This process solidifies the pond and causes the player to not be able to use a Fishing Rod on it until the formation is destroyed. If mined, the Nitre Formation drops 3-4 Nitre.They will regrow as long as acid rain is falling.

Trivia

  • Nitre Formations were added in the Terrors Below update.
  • Although it can be spawned via Console Commands, it can't be mined or destroyed, purposing only a decorative effect as only the graphic is spawned. Also spawning it on a pond won't connect the formation to it, even if they are already Nitre Formations.

Gallery

  • A Nitre Formation as it may appear in-game.
  • Nitre Pond

“It's definitely some kind of rock.”
–Wilson
“I don't know how anything could grow in that weird rain.”
–Willow
“It grew from burny rain?”
–Wolfgang
“It thrives while the rest of us burn.”
–Wendy
“IT GREW, BUT NOT IN A GROSS ORGANIC WAY”
–WX-78
“The acidic rain seems to have caused a chemical reaction, producing these formations.”
–Wickerbottom
“Guess that rain wasn't all bad, eh?”
–Woodie
“A large growth of nitre.”
–Maxwell
“A böön fröm the burning rain.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a big stack of rock stuff!”
–Webber
“Adding a dash of acid to the mix created these formations.”
–Warly
“Bunch of Pow Rocks”
–Wormwood
“Oh, I've got big plans for that!”
–Winona
“After a while it formed a pile.”
–Wortox
“Big bunch of funny rocks.”
–Wurt
“Huh. Looks like a big clump of rocks.”
–Walter
“How exciting, more rocks!”
–Wanda
A Nitre Formation is an object in Don't Starve Together that forms in Blue Ponds (characterized by their color, Algae and Eels) in the Caves as a result of Acid Rain. This process solidifies the pond and causes the player to not be able to use a Fishing Rod on it until the formation is destroyed. If mined, the Nitre Formation drops 3-4 Nitre.They will regrow as long as acid rain is falling.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Nitre Formations were added in the Terrors Below update.
Although it can be spawned via Console Commands, it can't be mined or destroyed, purposing only a decorative effect as only the graphic is spawned. Also spawning it on a pond won't connect the formation to it, even if they are already Nitre Formations.

A '''Nitre Formation''' is an object in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that forms in Blue [[Ponds]] (characterized by their color, Algae and Eels) in the [[Caves]] as a result of [[Acid Rain]]. This process solidifies the pond and causes the player to not be able to use a [[Fishing Rod]] on it until the formation is destroyed. If mined, the Nitre Formation drops 3-4 [[Nitre]].They will regrow as long as acid rain is falling.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* Nitre Formations were added in the ''[[From Beyond#Terrors Below|Terrors Below]]'' update.
* Although it can be spawned via [[Console/Don't Starve Together Commands|Console Commands]], it can't be mined or destroyed, purposing only a decorative effect as only the graphic is spawned. Also spawning it on a pond won't connect the formation to it, even if they are already Nitre Formations.
